title: crotalaria lathyroides
intro: Crotalaria lathyroides, also known as Lathyris or Madan, is a plant species belonging to the pea family Fabaceae, native to tropical regions of Asia and Australia. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of Crotalaria lathyroides include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a diuretic and expectorant. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity and interactions with other medications.
